description_long: This house features a steep, red gabled roof with a prominent chimney and decorative shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light plaster, accented by wooden beams and a stone foundation. A wooden staircase and balcony wrap around one side, supported by posts and partially covered by a pergola. The windows are diamond-paned with wooden frames, and green climbing vines add a touch of nature to the facade. The main entryway is marked by a green door, accessible via a small set of steps and a covered porch. The overall design is quaint and rustic, evoking a storybook or cottage-like charm.
description: A charming, rustic two-story house with a steep red gabled roof, wooden balcony, and diamond-paned windows, accented by climbing vines and a green entry door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red gabled roof, main balcony with wooden railing, diamond-paned windows, and the main staircase leading up to the entry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plastered wall, stone foundation, wooden balcony, and extensive climbing vines along the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain plastered wall, minimal windows, and the edge of the balcony visible on the right.
description_view_3: Back/side view showing the green door, small porch with steps, circular window, and more climbing vines, as well as the continuation of the wooden staircase.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a green door, small set of steps, covered porch, and wooden railing, accented by climbing vines.
